mapper.sql: select id, serial_number, scada_guid from scada_device_bind
mapper.select: select s.serial_number, d.device_name, d.product_id from scada_device_bind s left join iot_device d on s.serial_number = d.serial_number where s.scada_guid = #{guid} and d.del_flag = '0'

select sm.guid scada_guid, d.serial_number, d.device_name, d.status from scene_model sm left join scene_model_device smd on sm.scene_model_id = smd.scene_model_id left join iot_device d on smd.cus_device_id = d.device_id and d.del_flag = '0' where sm.guid = #{scadaDeviceBindVO.scadaGuid} and smd.variable_type = 1 and sm.del_flag = 0 and smd.del_flag = 0
and d.serial_number = #{scadaDeviceBindVO.serialNumber}
